_source: ICCT Global LCA 2021 + MIT Climate Portal 2022 + IEA Global EV Outlook 2023
_note: Base manufacturing kgCO2e per vehicle. Scaled by VClass size factor in carbon_engine.py.

_breakdown_Hybrid.source: ICCT 2021 + IEA 2023 battery cost estimate for ~8.8 kWh NiMH/Li-ion pack

_breakdown_EV.source: ICCT 2021 + IEA 2023: 60-75 kWh Li-ion pack at ~85-100 kgCO2/kWh (avg grid)
_breakdown_EV.note: Battery pack dominates EV manufacturing footprint. Halves by 2030 as grid cleans up.

_size_scaling.note: Applied in carbon_engine.py SIZE_SCALE dict — 20 VClass categories from 0.82x (Two Seater) to 1.24x (Standard SUV 4WD)
_size_scaling.source: ICCT 2021 supplementary data + EPA VClass weight classifications

_battery_disposal.note: Separate from manufacturing. EV: large Li-ion pack recycling. ICE/Hybrid: catalytic converter + fluids. See carbon_engine.py end_of_life_em.
